text: It was a video that illustrated the perils of working from home.
Now, the Hippity Hop family is letting us know how they're doing today.
Six years ago, this four-year-old girl captivated hearts around the world when she hippity hopped into her father's home office during a live TV interview.
And I think one of your children just walked in, I mean she's...
Marian is now 10 years old, posing in a pink sequin dress with her dad, Professor Robert E. Kelly.
And here's her five year old brother grinning from ear to ear.
He was just nine months old when he also crashed his dad's interview, waddling in his walker behind big sis.
Seconds later, it's super mom to the rescue.
Now, the entire family is marking the six year anniversary in South Korea, where they live.
